item.name: REST controller for AI agent operations.
SSE streaming endpoint for supervisor agent invocation.

request.description:
SSE streaming endpoint for supervisor agent invocation.
Streams response chunks as Server-Sent Events.

SSE events:
- event: message
data: <text>

 — for each response text chunk
- event: tool_call
data:{"id":"...","name":"...","input":{}}

 — when a tool is called
- event: tool_output
data: <output>

 — tool execution result
- event: error
data: <error>

 — on error
- data: [DONE]

 — stream end sentinel

item.name: SSE streaming endpoint for specific agent invocation.

request.description:
SSE streaming endpoint for specific agent invocation.
Streams response chunks as Server-Sent Events.

SSE events:
- event: message
data: <text>

 — for each response text chunk
- event: tool_call
data:{"id":"...","name":"...","input":{}}

 — when a tool is called
- event: tool_output
data: <output>

 — tool execution result
- event: error
data: <error>

 — on error
- data: [DONE]

 — stream end sentinel

request.description: Overall health check.

item.name: Health check controller for Vision Service.

request.description: Liveness probe endpoint.
Readiness probe endpoint.
Root-level health check (matches Python GET /health).
Object detection using ONNX Runtime + YOLOv8 ONNX. Multipart form field: file.
Image captioning using ONNX Runtime + BLIP ONNX. Multipart form field: file.
OCR using Tess4J + Tesseract. Multipart form field: file.

item.name: Image generation endpoint using Stable Diffusion.

request.description:
Image generation endpoint using Stable Diffusion.
Python API: POST /image-gen/generate

Image variation endpoint.
Python API: POST /image-gen/variation

Image upscale endpoint.
Python API: POST /image-gen/upscale

List available image generation models.
Python API: GET /image-gen/models

Clear model cache.
Python API: POST /image-gen/cache/clear

Image generation health check.
Python API: GET /image-gen/health

Combined vision analysis endpoint.
Supports both multipart/form-data (legacy) and application/json.
Python API: POST /vision/analyze

Generate video from text prompt.
Python API: POST /video/generate

Generate video with advanced options.
Python API: POST /video/generate/advanced

Get video task status.
Python API: GET /video/status/{taskId}
List available vision capabilities.

item.name: Health check controller for media module.
REST controller for media/image generation operations.
Health and status endpoints for RAG service.

request.description:
Basic health check.
GET /api/rag/health

item.name: Detailed health check with component status.

request.description:
Detailed health check with component status.
GET /api/rag/health/detailed

Service info endpoint.
GET /api/rag/info

item.name: REST controller for document management operations.

request.description:
List all documents.
GET /api/rag/documents

Upload and ingest a document.
POST /api/rag/documents/upload

Ingest a document from URL.
POST /api/rag/documents/ingest-url

Get document details.
GET /api/rag/documents/{doc_id}

Get document statistics.
GET /api/rag/documents/{doc_id}/stats

Delete a document.
DELETE /api/rag/documents/{doc_id}

Re-index a document.
POST /api/rag/documents/{doc_id}/reindex

Clean up all documents.
POST /api/rag/documents/cleanup-all

Health check endpoint.
GET /api/rag/documents/health

item.name: REST controller for RAG chat operations.

request.description:
Non-streaming chat endpoint.
POST /api/rag/chat/

Streaming chat endpoint.
POST /api/rag/chat/stream

item.name: Get chat history for a session.

request.description:
Get chat history for a session.
GET /api/rag/chat/history/{session_id}

item.name: Clear chat history for a session.

request.description:
Clear chat history for a session.
DELETE /api/rag/chat/history/{session_id}

item.name: Ingest text directly as a document.

request.description:
Ingest text directly as a document.
POST /api/rag/chat/ingest-text

Root endpoint with service info.
GET /api/text

List available LLM providers.
GET /api/text/providers

item.name: List available models for a provider.

request.description:
List available models for a provider.
GET /api/text/models?provider=X

Non-streaming chat completion.
POST /api/text/chat

Streaming chat completion with SSE.
POST /api/text/chat/stream

Produces SSE events:
- event: meta, data:{"token": "..."} for each token chunk
- event: done, data: [DONE] when complete
- event: error, data:{"error": "..."} on error

Health check endpoint.
GET /api/text/health
